title: Project-local mutation allowlist
description: Schema for `<project-root>/.claude/mutation-allowlist.yml` (or .json). The hook merges these entries into the built-in allowlists at runtime. The schema is version-pinned: unknown fields produce a warning, never an error.

version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for the v2.x hook series.

framework_receivers.description: Identifiers added to the framework-receiver allowlist (e.g. custom router objects whose `.push` method is non-mutating).

hot_path_segments.description: Path segments that should be treated as hot-path directories (TypedArray / ArrayBuffer mutation auto-allowed).

skip_segments.description: Path segments that mark an out-of-scope file (e.g. `/legacy/` or `/vendor/`). Matched files are not analyzed.

skip_suffixes.description: File suffixes that mark an out-of-scope file (e.g. `.legacy.ts`).

param_reassign_allowed_names.description: Parameter names that may be reassigned without flagging (e.g. `acc`, `result`).

disable_detectors.description: Detector tags to silence project-wide. Use sparingly; prefer line-level suppression. Detector tags follow the `category.specific` shape: `array.push`, `property.assignment`, etc.

experimental_detectors.description: Experimental detectors enabled project-wide via this config (equivalent to setting `MUTATION_METHOD_EXPERIMENTAL_<NAME>=1`).
